title: User interface updates
body:
* **Dual-axis charts now support zoom**: You can now click and drag to zoom in on dual-axis charts.
* **Pin table columns**: You can now pin table columns to the left side of the table display. Columns stay in view as you scroll right on the table. See  [Column settings](/aws/en/visualizations/tables#column-settings).
* **Fixed an issue with combo charts**: Resolved misalignment between x-axis labels and bars when using a temporal field on the x-axis.
